tagline: Browse Google Drive without leaving chat.
longDescription:
Browse, search, read, upload, and organize Google Drive without leaving the chat. Talk to Claude in natural language ("find the slide deck I started in March", "download the latest sales spreadsheet to my Desktop", "create a folder called 2026-Taxes and move these into it") and it executes against the real Drive via `rclone` — no copy-paste, no tab-switching, no flaky browser automation.

First run walks you through `rclone config` once to authorize a `gdrive:` remote; after that every Drive operation is an instant CLI call under the hood. Works with personal Drive and Workspace accounts, supports nested paths, and respects your existing folder structure. Pairs naturally with `youcoded-encyclopedia` if you want Claude to pull source material from your Drive into your personal knowledge base.
